title: eriosema pumilum var. pumilum
intro: Eriosema pumilum var. pumilum, a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, is also known as the 'Small Eriosema' or 'Pumila Eriosema'. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Eriosema pumilum var. pumilum can be prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and it is often used in herbal remedies, such as teas and tonics, to promote overall well-being.
